design_plan: Cinematic executive-focused hero, editorial typography with Satoshi/Geist stack, dense CSS Grid bento for credibility sections, GSAP-enhanced but guarded motion, calm premium palette, contrast-first CTAs. Explicit grid-auto-flow: dense for all bento layouts.
headline: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

site_brief.audience: busy executives who want a real personal assistant
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: busy executives who want a real personal assistant AI assistant
busy executives who want a real personal assistant personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

summary: A conversion-focused niche landing page positioning Super as a practical personal AI agent for executives—one that actually operates computers, reuses a computer-use cache, and reduces friction across repeated executive workflows. Built with a dense bento grid, editorial design, and evidence from current reporting on AI agents and computer-use automation.
